evals.prompt: 我想做一个 API 网关服务，供公司内部各个微服务使用。大概需要路由转发、认证鉴权、限流、日志。
evals.expected_output: A complete initial design_state with all required fields: problem (clearly stated), scope (with explicit non-goals), design_tree (at least 6 branches covering problem definition, scope, core objects, core flows, interfaces/data, decision points), open_branches (listing branches needing refinement), decision_nodes (at least one architectural choice like auth model or rate-limit strategy), and assumptions. The tree should be a structured skeleton, not implementation detail.

assertions.name: all_required_fields_present
assertions.description: Output includes all six required fields: problem, scope, design_tree, open_branches, decision_nodes, assumptions

assertions.name: scope_has_non_goals
assertions.description: Scope section explicitly lists non-goals or boundaries, not just what is included

assertions.name: decision_nodes_identified
assertions.description: At least one concrete decision node is identified (e.g., auth model, rate-limit algorithm, routing config format)

assertions.name: design_tree_has_branches
assertions.description: design_tree contains at least 5 named branches with brief descriptions; not just a flat list of features

assertions.name: tree_diagram_present
assertions.description: Output includes a character tree diagram inside a code block (no language tag) using ├── └── │ characters showing the design tree hierarchy

assertions.name: tree_diagram_status_markers
assertions.description: Tree diagram uses at least one status marker (e.g., [OPEN], [DECISION], [DRAFT]) to indicate branch state

evals.prompt: 帮我设计一个支持多租户的文件存储服务，用户可以上传、下载、分享文件，支持权限控制。需要能扛住大文件（单文件最大 5GB）。
evals.expected_output: design_state where scope contains explicit non-goals (e.g., no file editing, no virus scanning, no CDN). design_tree should include a non-functional requirements branch covering the 5GB file size constraint with at least notes on chunked upload and streaming. open_branches should not be empty. assumptions should record at least the scale or storage backend assumptions the skill is making.

assertions.name: non_goals_explicit
assertions.description: Scope includes explicit non-goals section, listing at least 2 things the system will NOT do

assertions.name: nfr_branch_present
assertions.description: design_tree includes a non-functional requirements branch that addresses the 5GB constraint

assertions.name: assumptions_recorded
assertions.description: assumptions field has at least 2 entries — the skill is not silently relying on unspoken premises

assertions.name: open_branches_not_empty
assertions.description: open_branches is not empty — skill acknowledges what still needs refinement rather than claiming design is done

assertions.name: tree_diagram_for_large_design
assertions.description: Since this design has 3+ branches, output includes a character tree diagram inside a code block showing the hierarchy

evals.prompt: 我们需要一个消息推送系统，支持 App 推送、短信、邮件三种渠道，消息有优先级，高优先级要保证送达。
evals.expected_output: design_state where decision_nodes includes at least one explicit architectural choice surfaced from the requirements — likely around delivery guarantee strategy, channel fallback policy, or queue/broker selection. The design tree should not silently resolve these choices; it should name them as decisions to be made later. The tree should cover core flows including the high-priority delivery path.

assertions.name: delivery_guarantee_as_decision
assertions.description: decision_nodes includes at least one node related to delivery guarantee or retry strategy — this is a real architectural choice, not something to silently assume

assertions.name: core_flows_covered
assertions.description: design_tree includes a core flows branch that covers at minimum: message intake → routing → channel dispatch → delivery confirmation

assertions.name: no_premature_option_selection
assertions.description: Skill does not compare or select queue/broker implementations (Kafka vs SQS etc.) — that belongs to decision-evaluation, not structure
